requirements.task_name: Save the newest restaurant branding case study from 2022 or later to favorites
requirements.task_description: Find restaurant/food branding projects in the portfolio filtered to 2022 or later, then save the single most recent case study to your favorites.

requirements.task_name: Add one ecommerce and one portfolio website template under $60 with 4+ stars to cart and start checkout
requirements.task_description: Cart contains exactly 2 items (1 ecommerce template and 1 portfolio template) with individual prices under $60 and star ratings of 4 or higher, and the checkout review page is opened.

required_variables.set_condition: After computing checkoutCart and available_delivery_options, whenever checkoutCart.cart_id is non-null and checkoutCart.items.length > 0 (i.e., the checkout review summary is generated for a non-empty cart).
required_variables.value_to_set: An object capturing which cart was summarized and basic context, for example: { "cart_id": checkoutCart.cart_id, "item_count": checkoutCart.items.length, "opened_at": this._now() }.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to confirm that the checkout review page was actually opened for a real cart, and to associate that event with the current cart state (which can then be checked to ensure it had exactly 2 qualifying website template items at that time).

requirements.task_name: Request a branding package under $5000 that includes both logo design and brand guidelines
requirements.task_description: Compare branding service packages and choose the cheapest option under $5000 that explicitly includes both logo design and brand guidelines, then submit a project request with correct budget/description.

requirements.task_name: Fill the cart with 3 different merchandise items under $35 with free shipping, including at least one blue item
requirements.task_description: Cart contains 3 distinct merchandise products, each priced under $35, all marked with free shipping, and at least one selected in a blue color variant; one item’s quantity is increased but success is defined by distinct items and their properties.

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to the monthly design tips newsletter after exploring two recent UX case studies
requirements.task_description: Newsletter form is submitted with frequency set to monthly, interest set to design tips, and the titles of two 2023+ UX case studies typed into the notes/details field.

requirements.task_name: Create a favorites list of 4 digital design resources under $25 from at least 3 different creators
requirements.task_description: Favorites list includes exactly 4 digital products, each under $25 with rating >= 4.5 stars, and from at least 3 different creators/authors.

requirements.task_name: Plan a multi-industry app project using three mobile app design case studies
requirements.task_description: Project planner form is submitted with at least one insight from each of three case studies (healthcare, fintech, education), target launch date set to 2025-09-01, and budget range set to $50k–$75k.

required_variables.set_condition: When getCaseStudyDetails(caseStudyId) successfully finds a case study whose industry is one of ['healthcare', 'fintech', 'education'] and whose year is between 2021 and 2024 (inclusive). For such a case study, read the current object from localStorage (if any), update the entry for its industry, and write it back.
required_variables.value_to_set: Merge/update an object of the form: { "healthcare": { "case_study_id": cs.id, "viewed_at": this._now() }, "fintech": { ... }, "education": { ... } }. Only the corresponding industry key should be added/overwritten on each call; other keys must be preserved.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to confirm that at least one qualifying case study from each of the healthcare, fintech, and education industries (within the 2021–2024 window) was actually opened before the project plan was submitted. Combined with project_plans.description, target_launch_date, and budget_range, this provides sufficient evidence that the multi-industry app project was planned using three appropriate case studies.

requirements.task_name: Apply a 10% coupon to the cheapest UI kit bundle with both desktop and mobile layouts between $40 and $120
requirements.task_description: Find a UI kit bundle that includes both desktop and mobile layouts, costs between $40 and $120, has rating >= 4 stars, add the cheapest qualifying bundle to cart, and apply coupon code WELCOME10.
